label: Ingestible properties
description: Properties for food, drugs, and other ingestible items. Covers nutrition, joy, drug effects, and ingestion behavior.

foodType.label: Food type
foodType.description: FoodTypeFlags value controlling which hunger categories this satisfies (comma-separated flags).

nutrition.label: Nutrition
nutrition.description: Nutrition provided per ingestion. Reduces hunger by this amount.

joyKind.label: Joy kind
joyKind.description: JoyKindDef describing the type of joy this provides.

maxNumToIngestAtOnce.label: Max num to ingest at once
maxNumToIngestAtOnce.description: Maximum units consumed in a single ingestion action.

minNumToIngestAtOnce.label: Min num to ingest at once
minNumToIngestAtOnce.description: Minimum units consumed in a single ingestion action.

chairSearchRadius.label: Chair search radius
chairSearchRadius.description: Radius in cells within which the pawn searches for a chair to sit while eating.

baseIngestTicks.label: Base ingest ticks
baseIngestTicks.description: Game ticks required to consume this item.

ingestHoldUsesTable.label: Ingest hold uses table
ingestHoldUsesTable.description: If true, the pawn searches for a table to eat at before eating on the ground.

ingestHoldOffsetStanding.label: Ingest hold offset (standing)
ingestHoldOffsetStanding.description: Position offset of the item in the pawn's hand while eating standing up.

ingestHoldOffsetLying.label: Ingest hold offset (lying)
ingestHoldOffsetLying.description: Position offset of the item while eating in bed.

soundEat.label: Sound eat
soundEat.description: SoundDef played while eating this item.

soundDrink.label: Sound drink
soundDrink.description: SoundDef played while drinking this item.

ingestEffectEat.label: Ingest effect (eat)
ingestEffectEat.description: EffecterDef triggered specifically on eating (not drinking).

nurseable.label: Nurseable
nurseable.description: If true, this food can be administered by a nurse to a patient in bed.

preferability.label: Preferability
preferability.description: Food preferability category used by AI to rank dining options.

drugCategory.label: Drug category
drugCategory.description: Broad drug category controlling policy restrictions.

isPleasureDrug.label: Is pleasure drug
isPleasureDrug.description: If true, pawns may take this drug recreationally as a mood booster.

tasteThought.label: Taste thought
tasteThought.description: ThoughtDef added after ingesting this item.

sourceDef.label: Source def
sourceDef.description: ThingDef that is the raw source of this ingestible (e.g. the plant a meal is cooked from).

canAutoSelectAsMealIngredient.label: Can auto-select as meal ingredient
canAutoSelectAsMealIngredient.description: Whether this item can be automatically chosen as an ingredient when cooking.

outcomeDoers.label: Outcome doers
outcomeDoers.description: List of IngestionOutcomeDoer entries that apply effects after ingestion (e.g. hediff adders, thought givers).
